cases.title: OLD TOM DISTILLERY — clean pass
cases.description: The brief's example distilled-spirits label. Every field on the label matches the application and the government warning is exact, so the engine should return a clean pass.

application.name_and_address: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Bardstown, KY

label.name_and_address: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Bardstown, KY
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: All fields match and the warning is verbatim and all-caps.

cases.title: COASTAL VINES — imported wine, clean pass
cases.description: A second product type (wine) and source (imported) so the corpus exercises vintage, appellation, and country-of-origin fields. Everything matches; clean pass.

application.name_and_address: Imported by Coastal Vines Selections, New York, NY

label.name_and_address: Imported by Coastal Vines Selections, New York, NY
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: All wine fields match and the warning is compliant.

cases.title: STONE'S THROW — case-only brand difference (soft warning)
cases.description: Dave's nuance: the label reads 'STONE'S THROW' in all caps while the application has 'Stone's Throw'. Obviously the same brand, so this is a soft warning, not a hard mismatch.

application.name_and_address: Distilled by Stone's Throw Spirits, Portland, OR

label.name_and_address: Distilled by Stone's Throw Spirits, Portland, OR
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: Brand differs only by letter case; flag as a soft warning for a human glance rather than failing the label.

cases.title: Silver Creek — ABV mismatch (fail)
cases.description: The most common data-entry error: the application says 45% but the label prints 40%. A genuine numeric mismatch the agent must catch.

application.name_and_address: Bottled by Silver Creek Distillers, Lynchburg, TN

label.name_and_address: Bottled by Silver Creek Distillers, Lynchburg, TN
label.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: Label ABV (40%) does not match the application (45%).

cases.title: Highland Mist — title-case government warning (fail)
cases.description: Jenny's catch: every field matches, but the warning reads 'Government Warning:' in title case instead of the required all-caps 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:'. The exact-match warning path must fail it.

application.name_and_address: Brewed by Highland Mist Brewing, Asheville, NC

label.name_and_address: Brewed by Highland Mist Brewing, Asheville, NC
label.government_warning: Government Warning: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

golden.rationale: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING:' must be all caps; title case is a non-compliant alteration regardless of other fields matching.

cases.title: Cedar Ridge — missing government warning (fail)
cases.description: Fields match but the mandatory government warning is absent from the label entirely. The warning is required on all alcohol beverages, so this fails.

application.name_and_address: Produced and bottled by Cedar Ridge Vineyards, Sonoma, CA

label.name_and_address: Produced and bottled by Cedar Ridge Vineyards, Sonoma, CA

golden.rationale: The mandatory government health warning is absent.
